title: Updated home screen
newsMessage: As of version 2.7.0 we have made some changes to the home screen to make the layout a little prettier and cleaner.

title: About Premium
newsMessage: We got some questions and comments about Brick Manager Premium. Brick Manager has been free for more than 5 years, but the tools and services the app relies on are no longer free. Because of that I had to make a choice: either shut the app down or introduce a premium option to keep it alive. Hope that clears up some questions.

title: Introduction prices Premium
newsMessage: First of all we would like thank everyone who supported Brick Manager by going Premium. It is much appreciated! You still have until May 30st to benefit from the introduction prices.
